name: Module Registry
description: Manages module-level groupings of features, persisting ModuleEntry data alongside the feature registry. Provides lookup of which features belong to which module.

Managers/ModuleRegistryManager.cs.content:
class ModuleRegistryManager
  LoadModuleIndexAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<ModuleIndex>
  SaveModuleIndexAsync(string projectPath, ModuleIndex index) -> Task
  LoadModuleAsync(string projectPath, string moduleId) -> Task<ModuleEntry?>
  LoadAllModulesAsync(string projectPath) -> Task<List<ModuleEntry>>
  SaveModuleAsync(string projectPath, ModuleEntry module) -> Task
  RemoveModuleAsync(string projectPath, string moduleId) -> Task
  GetFeaturesInModule(ModuleEntry module, List<FeatureEntry> allFeatures) -> List<FeatureEntry>
  RebuildModuleIndex(List<ModuleEntry> modules) -> ModuleIndex
  Dispose() -> void

Models/ModuleEntry.cs.content:
class ModuleEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  Description: string
  Category: string
  FeatureIds: List<string>
  Keywords: List<string>
  LastUpdatedAt: DateTime
class ModuleIndex
  Version: int
  Modules: List<ModuleIndexEntry>
class ModuleIndexEntry
  Id: string
  Name: string
  FeatureIds: List<string>

patterns: Parallel JSON storage alongside feature registry
